response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified video as 'hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025>2026'. 2. Scene 1 (00:00-00:49): 'Tangled Thread' performed by Mori Calliope, Kiara, Ina. Searched for lyrics using title and artist. 3. Scene 2 (00:49-04:48): 'Hyper Jumpin'' performed by Kiara, Pekora, Nene, Botan. Lyric search performed. 4. Scene 3 (04:48-05:00): 'Dramatic XViltration' performed by Miko, Moona, Iofi. Lyric search performed. 5. Lyrics retrieved and formatted.
response.global_summary: The video is a recording of the 'hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025>2026', featuring three vocal performances by various VTubers. The songs performed are 'Tangled Thread', 'Hyper Jumpin'', and 'Dramatic XViltration'.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, and Ninomae Ina'nis perform 'Tangled Thread' on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
I'm waiting for
a train that never comes
The station floor
Is lined with scattered pictures
Of places
I thought that I would go
The way forward
Through pain that's left me numb
Is still unsure
The compass was a promise
To shine here
To make it on your own
So you keep on waiting
Wanting
Faking you're someone you're not
Reaching
Longing
Changing for someone
'Til you realize you're still just stuck here
Waiting for
a train that never comes
Back at the start, you bet a lot on hope
When there's a million different branching roads
Every decision, every line you wrote
There was a vision with each chord and every note
Blank refrains came to life in darkness
Crowded cities, crisis and catharsis
So don't leave it alone
No don't leave me alone
You can say you miss home, back where your heart is
A voice rings out
Cutting the noise
And maybe it's hopeless
Change without choice
Disaster and wonder, laughter through tears
The hourglass turns
We'll blink and the years have gone by
In a lifetime
Where nothing's set in stone
So you keep on waiting
Wanting
Faking you're someone you're not
Reaching
Longing
Changing for someone
'Til you realize you're still just stuck here
Waiting for
a chance to make it real
Everything you've wanted
Was right before your eyes
And in time, you'll find them again
Impossible dreams
For a moment in this fleeting life
You'll stand in the light of
All that you could be
I waited for
a train that's come and gone
For something more
I guess I'm walking home now
But you'll find me, no matter where I go

scenes.description: Sakura Miko, Moona Hoshinova, and Airani Iofifteen perform 'Dramatic XViltration'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Sakura Miko, Moona Hoshinova, Airani Iofifteen
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Bukalah mata dan bangunkan diri
Tiada waktu 'tuk bermimpi
Dunia akan menjadi saksi
Menyambut bangkitnya “kami”
Pantulan cermin-cermin
Menyinari sanubari
Terbengkalai
Sekarang dapat 'ku rasa
Panggilan yang terus menggema
Di dalam dada
Seakan terangkat lagi
Semua memori
Sebelum menjadi raga yang
Telah ditakdiri
Dalam labirin
Yang tiada akhir
Ke mana pun 'ku pergi
Hanya senja hari yang menanti
Rantai-rantai mengikat diri ini
Membisikkan, “jangan pergi”
Kecemasan pun menghampiri
Memadam suara hati
Di balik esok hari ini
Area tak terjelajahi
Suatu saat 'kan lewati
Garis tepi
'Tuk bangkitkan “kami”
Melayang dalam gelap
Tanpa sadarkan betapa
Lama waktu yang
Telah berlalu mengalir
Semuanya terbi singkan
Dentang jarum jam
Seakan teringat lagi
Tepi laut sepi
Dan hari-hari di hutan
Tak diketahui
Jatuh dari
Langit, 'tuk jauhi
Masa lalu yang masih
Kini juga menghantui diri
Rantai-rantai menahan diri ini
Meskipun lanjut mencari
Asal usul kejadian diri
Yang tak akan terganti
Lima puluh satu misteri
Yang tak dapat terpecahi
Seperti bangunnya diri yang
Lain ini
Tersatukan lagi
Kartu-kartu takdir
Menunjukkan masa depan
(Lembaran baru)
Hilangkan bimbang
Rantai-rantai yang membebani hati
Takkan lagi menghalangi
Diri baru ini menanti
Sorotan matahari
Melangkah maju memasuki
Area tak terjelajahi
Saatnya datang 'tuk lewati
Garis tepi
Dan sambut mentari
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Open your eyes and wake yourself up
There's no time to dream
The world will bear witness
To the awakening of 'us'
Reflection of mirrors
Shining into the soul
Left behind
Now I can feel
The call that keeps echoing
Inside the chest
As if memories are lifted again
Before becoming a body
That is destined
In a labyrinth
That has no end
Wherever I go
Only the twilight awaits
Chains tie this self
Whispering, 'don't go'
Anxiety approaches
To silent the voice of the heart
Behind this tomorrow
Is an unexplored area
Someday I will cross
The edge
To awaken 'us'
Floating in the dark
Without realizing how
Long the time
Has passed flowing
Everything is muffled
By the ticking of the clock
As if I remember again
The quiet seaside
And days in the forest
Unknown
Falling from
The sky, to avoid
The past that still
Haunts me now
Chains hold this self
Although I continue searching
For the origin of my existence
That will not be replaced
Fifty-one mysteries
That cannot be solved
Like the awakening of the other self
United again
Cards of fate
Show the future
(New chapter)
Eliminate doubt
Chains that burden the heart
Will no longer hinder
This new self awaits
The sun's rays
Stepping forward into
The unexplored area
The time has come to cross
The edge
And welcome the sun
